ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status__c ) , ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Pick List'), AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'For Approval')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'For Item Approval')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'For Ordering')) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Not allowed to set to Pick List.
